clinics.title: Clinics
clinics.subtitle: Manage all clinic accounts and AI assistants.

training.title: AI Knowledge Pool
training.subtitle: Ensure your assistant has access to all clinical information from here.
training.writeNoteSubtitle: Add clinic information so your assistant can answer correctly
training.aiInstruction: The AI assistant has added this information to its library.

placeholders.title: e.g., Working Hours
placeholders.content: Details you want the assistant to know...

empty.title: No training data yet
empty.description: Start by adding your first piece of information

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage platform and clinic user accounts.

auth.adminOnly: Only administrators can access this page.
auth.pendingMessage: Your account has not been authorized yet. Please contact your system administrator.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track clinic performance and usage metrics.

settings.subtitle: Manage administrator preferences and system configurations.

dashboard.title: Clinics Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of all clinic accounts and system-wide metrics.
dashboard.noClinicsDesc: Add your first clinic to start managing AI assistants.
dashboard.noResultsDesc: We couldn't find any clinic matching your search.

modal.name: Clinic Name
modal.successDesc: has been successfully added to the system.

errors.fetch: Connection error: Data could not be retrieved. Showing local data.
errors.validation: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save clinic. Please check your connection.

widget.integrationSubtitle: Embed your ClinicBridge assistant into your website in a few steps.
widget.installNote: Paste this code before the closing </body> tag on your website.
widget.shareableLinkNote: Share this direct link with patients or use it on lobby tablets.
widget.customDomainNote: Use your own branded domain (e.g., ai.yourclinic.com) instead of the default link. Perfect for professional branding.

aiSettings.testSubtitle: Test your prompt settings before making them live.
aiSettings.typeMessage: Type a message to the AI...
aiSettings.promptStudioSubtitle: Define the assistant’s core personality, clinic expertise, and communication style.
aiSettings.systemInstructionPlaceholder: e.g., You are a professional and helpful AI assistant working for this clinic...
aiSettings.systemInstructionHelper: characters · This field only defines the assistant identity. Use the behavior rules below for response quality settings.
aiSettings.behaviorSettingsSubtitle: Define the assistant’s communication boundaries and goals when speaking with patients.

accuracy.title: Clear and Accurate Answer
accuracy.desc: Provides direct, understandable answers without unnecessary complexity.

noGuessing.title: Does Not Over-Assume
noGuessing.desc: Does not make assumptions when uncertain or when medical diagnosis is required.

appointmentRouting.title: Guides to Appointment
appointmentRouting.desc: Encourages the patient to visit the clinic or book an appointment when appropriate.

patientSatisfaction.title: Patient Satisfaction
patientSatisfaction.desc: Uses an empathetic, polite, and professional tone.

consistency.title: Consistency
consistency.desc: Avoids giving contradictory information about clinic policies and rules.

fastResolution.title: Fast Resolution
fastResolution.desc: Guides the user to the shortest path toward a solution without extending the conversation unnecessarily.

aiSettings.guardrailsSubtitle: These are hard rules that prioritize patient safety and compliance. They cannot be overridden by standard prompts.

noDiagnosis.title: No Medical Diagnosis
noDiagnosis.desc: Do not provide medical diagnosis or treatment recommendations.

noAssumptions.title: No Assumptions
noAssumptions.desc: Do not assume patient condition without clear information.

emergencyRouting.title: Emergency Guidance
emergencyRouting.desc: If situation is urgent, direct user to clinic or emergency services.

dataPrivacy.title: Data Privacy
dataPrivacy.desc: Avoid sharing sensitive or personal data.

appointments.title: Recent Appointments
appointments.subtitle: View recent appointments booked via AI or manually.
appointments.emptyDesc: AI or manual bookings will appear here.

aiSkills.title: AI Skills & Capabilities
aiSkills.subtitle: Manage your assistant's operational capabilities and tools.

send_patient_satisfaction_survey.title: Patient Satisfaction Survey
send_patient_satisfaction_survey.description: Sends a short satisfaction survey after the appointment or after an AI conversation.

collect_appointment_feedback.title: Appointment Feedback
collect_appointment_feedback.description: Collects feedback about appointment experience, doctor communication, waiting time and clinic service.

follow_up_treatment_interest.title: Treatment Interest Follow-up
follow_up_treatment_interest.description: Follows up with patients who asked about treatments but did not book an appointment.

create_appointment_request.title: Appointment Request
create_appointment_request.description: Helps patients request a new appointment from available contact options.

send_appointment_reminder.title: Appointment Reminder
send_appointment_reminder.description: Sends reminder messages before scheduled appointments.

follow_up_missed_appointment.title: Missed Appointment Follow-up
follow_up_missed_appointment.description: Sends a polite follow-up message to patients who missed their appointment.

human_handoff.title: Human Handoff
human_handoff.description: When patients want a real person, the assistant directs them to clinic staff via WhatsApp, Telegram or phone.

emergency_guidance.title: Emergency Guidance
emergency_guidance.description: If the patient describes urgent symptoms, the assistant avoids diagnosis and directs them to contact the clinic or emergency services.

knowledge_lookup.title: Knowledge Lookup
knowledge_lookup.description: Searches the clinic’s uploaded documents, FAQs and treatment information to answer patient questions.

clinic_policy_lookup.title: Clinic Policy Lookup
clinic_policy_lookup.description: Answers questions about clinic working hours, cancellation policy, pricing policy and appointment rules.
